en: I've never lived on a farm, but both of my parents grew up on farms.
cn: 我從沒有在農場住，但我的父母都在農場長大。

en: Can I leave my bags with you until I come to check in?
cn: 我來登記之前你可以先幫我看管行李嗎？

en: Had I known that, I wouldn't have said such a thing to her.
cn: 如果我早知道，我不会跟她说这种话。

en: When I was a child, I spent most of my time indoors reading.
cn: 当我是个孩子的时候，我会把大部分时间都用于室内阅读。

en: Surely he can not enter a second time into his mother's womb to be born!
cn: 他当然不可能回到娘胎里再出生一次了！

en: Do you have difficulty understanding what women or small children say to you?
cn: 你难以理解女人和小孩子对你说的话吗？

en: If you enjoy the work you do, you have something worth more than money.
cn: 如果你喜歡你做的工作，你就有比金錢更有價值的東西。

en: I learned to drive a car and got a driver's license when I was eighteen.
cn: 我十八歲時，學了開車、考到了駕照。

en: In order to move the project along smoothly, we have revised the plan several times.
cn: 为了顺利推进项目，我们已经修订了几次计划。

en: Tom couldn't understand why no one else wanted to go to the zoo.
cn: 汤姆想不通为啥没人想去动物园了。

en: According to some scholars, a major earthquake could occur at any moment now.
cn: 据一些学者称，现在可能随时发生一场特大地震。

en: Tanabata comes up in manga a lot so I also know it fairly well.
cn: 七夕在漫畫裡常常出現所以我也了解它的意思。

en: They set out with a guide just in case they lost their way.
cn: 他们和一个导游一起出发，只是为了以防迷路。

en: Coldness sometimes don't mean apathy. It's just a tool to avoid being hurt.
cn: 冷漠，有時候並不是無情，只是一種逃避被傷害的工具！

en: If he says "I love you" all the time he doesn't mean it.
cn: 如果他整天都在說「我愛你」，那就是代表他根本不是真心的。

en: I thought he loved you, but as it is, he loved another girl.
cn: 我以為他愛你，但事實上，他愛另一個女孩。

en: Both peoples lived off deer, small game, rodents, and even insects, but their main food sources were probably plants such as prickly pear cactus, mesquite beans, and pecan.
cn: 這兩個民族都以鹿、小型獵物、囓齒動物甚至昆蟲為生，但他們的主要食物來源可能是仙人掌、牧豆和山核桃等植物。

en: I guess what I've said isn't all that clear, but that's the only way I can explain it.
cn: 总觉得解释的不是很清楚...但我只知道这样...

en: The Soyuz spacecraft undocked from the International Space Station at 9:53 p.m. EDT, carrying three people back to Earth.
cn: 联盟号宇宙飞船于美国东部时间晚上9点53分脱离国际空间站，携带3人返回地球。

en: This teacher always drags his class time, taking up the students' rest time, later he got reported, it felt amazing.
cn: 这个老师总是拖堂，占用同学们课间休息的时间，后来他被举报了，真过瘾啊。

en: I went to the clothing store yesterday and bought a blue blouse and three pairs of pants.
cn: 昨天我去衣服店买了一件蓝色的衬衫和三件裤子。

en: I'm completely soaked from the rain. Can you drive over and pick me up right now?
cn: 我浑身都被雨水给淋湿了。你现在能不能开车来接我？

en: A grey day it is on the 4th of November of 2021. At the pizzeria, I could not sit eating my pizza at my regular table just outside the window, as a crowd of fresh brown teenagers were eating pizza there. So, I sat inside by the window. I could see the hairy arms of one brown teenager at the table outside. I went then to the cafe to have my usual iced green tea. I saw a longtime Filipino friend named Alma, who worked before at a corner convenience store, but now is in health care.
cn: 2021 年 11 月 4 日，陰沉沉的一天。在披薩店，我沒辦法像平常一樣坐在窗外的桌子吃披薩，因為那裡擠滿了皮膚黝黑的青少年。於是，我坐在了室內靠窗的位置。我可以看到外面桌子上一個棕色皮膚青少年毛茸茸的手臂。之後，我去了咖啡館，點了杯我常喝的冰綠茶。在那裡，我遇到了一個名叫阿爾瑪的菲律賓老朋友，她以前在街角的便利商店工作，現在從事醫療保健行業。

en: Young people and migrant workers are the bulk of rural Internet users; in terms of online music, online games, online film and television, and the Internet's capacity for entertainment, rural Internet users are equivalent to urban ones.
cn: 青年农民和外出务工农民是农村网民的主力军，在对诸如网络音乐、网络游戏、网络影视等互联网娱乐功能的使用上，农村网民和城镇网民相当。

en: A lot of people ask why the cat does not appear among the twelve animals of the Chinese zodiac.
cn: 很多人都會問，為什麼生肖的十二種動物裡沒有貓呢？

en: Cheese is a solid food made from the milk of cows, goats, sheep, and other mammals.
cn: 奶酪是由母牛、山羊、绵羊或其它哺乳动物的奶加工制成的固体食物。

en: They have both failed to find the most serious problem that has ever faced our planet.
cn: 他們倆都未能找到我們的星球所面臨最嚴重的問題。

en: If you cry because you miss the sun when it goes away, then you will also miss the stars.
cn: 如果，错过太阳的时候你在流泪，那么你也将错过群星。

en: Why am I the only one they complain about? They're just making an example out of me and using me as a scapegoat.
cn: 為什麼我是他們唯一抱怨的人? 他們就這樣拿我作例子, 利用我當代罪羔羊。

en: From childhood I was fond of reading, and all the little money that ever came into my hands was laid out in books.
cn: 從小開始我就很喜歡讀書，那時有的錢雖然不多，但也都全花在書本上。
